problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: Combining DNA computing for massively parallel search with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
